```markdown
---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Nora Sun"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r data-generation}
# Generate sample data
set.seed(123)
sample_data <- data.frame(
    x = rnorm(100),
    y = rnorm(100)
)
head(sample_data)
```

```{r data-visualization}
# Create a scatter plot
ggplot(sample_data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Sample Scatter Plot", x = "X-axis", y = "Y-axis")
```

```{r summary-statistics}
# Calculate summary statistics
summary_stats <- sample_data %>%
    summarise(
        mean_x = mean(x),
        mean_y = mean(y),
        sd_x = sd(x),
        sd_y = sd(y)
    )
summary_stats
```
